title: Food Waste
description: For questions 9 – 16, read the text below and think of the word which best fits each gap. Use only one word in each gap. There is an example at the beginning (0).

content.text: Food waste is (0) one of the most pressing environmental issues facing the world today. Approximately one-third of all food produced globally is wasted, amounting to about 1.3 billion tonnes per year.||This waste occurs (9) at every stage of the food supply chain, from farms to supermarkets to our own kitchens. In developing countries, most waste happens during production and storage (10) due to inadequate infrastructure and technology. In wealthier nations, however, the majority of waste occurs at the consumer level, (11) with households throwing away perfectly edible food simply because it has passed its 'best before' date.||The environmental impact of food waste is staggering. When food rots in landfills, (12) it produces methane, a greenhouse gas that is far more potent than carbon dioxide. Additionally, all the resources (13) used to produce that wasted food – including water, energy, and land – are also wasted. If food waste (14) were a country, it would be the third largest emitter of greenhouse gases after the United States and China.||Fortunately, there are solutions. Consumers can plan meals carefully, store food properly, and learn (15) to use leftovers creatively. Restaurants and supermarkets are beginning to donate surplus food to charities rather (16) than discarding it. By taking action at every level, we can significantly reduce food waste and its environmental impact.

example.text: Food waste is (0) of the most pressing environmental issues facing the world today.

questions.explanation: Expresión 'occurs at every stage' indica que sucede en todas las etapas.
Expresión 'due to' introduce la causa del desperdicio.
Preposición 'with' introduce información adicional sobre los hogares.
Pronombre sujeto que se refiere a la comida que se pudre.
Participio pasado: 'resources used to produce' en voz pasiva reducida.
Condicional hipotético: 'If food waste were a country' (segunda condicional).
Infinitivo con 'learn to use' indica aprender a hacer algo.
Comparación 'rather than' contrasta donar con descartar.
